name: spider
product_guide: About Me:Spider Plant (Chlorophytum comosum)|Watering:Keep soil lightly moist, allow top layer to dry between waterings|Light:Bright, indirect sunlight; avoid harsh direct rays|Temperature:Thrives at 18–24°C, protect from cold drafts|Humidity:Tolerates average home humidity, occasional misting helps|Fertilizer:Feed monthly in spring/summer with balanced liquid fertilizer|Propagation:Easy by plantlets (“babies”) that grow on long stems|Care Tip:Trim brown tips, repot when roots crowd|Pet Safety:Non-toxic to cats and dogs
